goal: Generate two additional 8x9 Isle pet atlases for RAG and provider activity while preserving the current core pet identity.

identityLock.description: A small original blue cat companion with compact chibi proportions, rounded head, large blue ears and tail, pale muzzle, blue forehead patch, blue heart chest mark, tiny paws, thick dark outline, flat cel shading, and pixel-art-adjacent edges.
preserve: same face shape, eye style, ear shape, tail shape, blue markings, and heart chest mark
same outline weight, palette, and compact readable silhouette
transparent-ready sprite on flat removable chroma-key background before atlas assembly
avoid: text, logos, UI panels, code snippets, speech bubbles, thought bubbles, visible guide marks, scenery, shadows, glows, motion trails, detached icons, detached sparkles, loose punctuation, and frame numbers
style drift into polished illustration, anime key art, 3D rendering, realistic fur, soft gradients, or high-detail anti-aliased art

rows.motionBrief: Slow focused breathing with a tiny head tilt and paw near the chin.
rows.prompt: Create a 6-frame horizontal sprite strip of Isle deep thinking. Keep the same small blue cat identity, thick outline, flat pixel-adjacent shading, and transparent-ready sprite spacing. Show a calm focused loop: slight body bob, narrowed attentive eyes, subtle blink, one paw near the chin, ears barely shifting. No props, no text, no floating symbols, no shadows, no motion trails.

rows.motionBrief: Searching posture with small side glances and paw movement.
rows.prompt: Create an 8-frame horizontal sprite strip of Isle retrieving knowledge. Preserve the exact Isle cat design and palette. Animate a compact search loop through face direction, eye movement, tail sway, and small paw motions close to the body. The action should read as looking through information without using papers, screens, text, icons, detached marks, shadows, or scenery.

rows.motionBrief: Recovering from a degraded or fallback path.
rows.prompt: Create an 8-frame horizontal sprite strip of Isle warning and recovering. Preserve the same blue cat identity. Show a worried slump that gradually steadies: drooped ears, blink, small exhale, then a tiny upright recovery. If using effects, only use a tiny attached opaque puff touching the body; no detached smoke, no red X, no warning icons, no text, no loose particles, no shadows.

rows.motionBrief: Carefully condensing context with a compact squeeze-and-release rhythm.
rows.prompt: Create a 6-frame horizontal sprite strip of Isle compressing context. Keep the same chibi blue cat, markings, and outline. Animate a careful squeeze-and-release posture: shoulders tuck in slightly, paws draw close to the chest, eyes focus, then the body relaxes. No text, no documents, no compression icons, no floating effects, no background elements.

rows.motionBrief: Alert second-pass scan with energetic look-left/look-right motion.
rows.prompt: Create an 8-frame horizontal sprite strip of Isle doing a FLARE second-pass scan. Preserve identity exactly. Show alert energy using quick head turns, bright attentive eyes, a tiny forward lean, and tail counter-motion. No scanning beams, no magnifying glass, no text, no floating icons, no speed lines, no shadows.

rows.motionBrief: Linking long-term memory through a calm nod and chest-level paw tap.
rows.prompt: Create a 6-frame horizontal sprite strip of Isle linking memory. Keep the same compact blue cat with heart chest mark. Animate a gentle recollection loop: eyes soften, head nods, one paw taps near the chest heart, tail gives a small confirming sway. No memory icons, no chain links, no bubbles, no text, no detached sparkles, no scenery.

rows.motionBrief: Mapping relationships with deliberate head turns and paw gestures.
rows.prompt: Create an 8-frame horizontal sprite strip of Isle mapping knowledge relationships. Preserve the exact cat identity and pixel-adjacent style. Show the idea through body language only: alternating head turns, focused eyes, small symmetrical paw gestures near the body, and a measured tail sway. No graph nodes, no lines, no charts, no text, no floating marks.

rows.motionBrief: Verifying source evidence with a focused review posture.
rows.prompt: Create a 6-frame horizontal sprite strip of Isle reviewing citations. Keep the same blue cat identity. Animate a careful verification loop: concentrated eyes, tiny blink, paw near chin, slight lean forward, then return to neutral. No papers, no quotation marks, no source labels, no text, no floating checkmarks, no UI panels.

rows.motionBrief: Busy indexing loop with rhythmic paw taps and energetic tail motion.
rows.prompt: Create an 8-frame horizontal sprite strip of Isle indexing knowledge. Preserve identity, markings, and outline. Animate a busy in-place work loop: quick paw taps close to the body, small upbeat bounce, attentive eyes, and tail keeping rhythm. Do not show literal running, keyboards, files, index cards, text, icons, speed lines, or dust.

atlasSpecs.description: Provider, model, tool, attachment, and connectivity activity states.

rows.motionBrief: General tool use through compact paw work.
rows.prompt: Create an 8-frame horizontal sprite strip of Isle using a tool. Keep the same blue cat identity. Show active work through close-to-body paw motions, attentive eyes, and a tiny bounce. No tools, icons, UI, text, detached effects, shadows, speed lines, or scenery.

rows.motionBrief: Model sync as a steady in-place busy loop.
rows.prompt: Create an 8-frame horizontal sprite strip of Isle syncing models. Preserve the exact chibi cat design. Animate a steady busy loop with rhythmic body bob, tail sway, and focused blink. It should feel like progress without showing literal running, sync icons, arrows, UI panels, text, glow, or motion trails.

rows.motionBrief: Quiet waiting for a model or provider to become available.
rows.prompt: Create a 6-frame horizontal sprite strip of Isle waiting offline. Keep the same blue cat identity and soft friendly face. Animate slow blink, small breathing, lowered energy, and gentle tail motion. No plug icons, no warning signs, no text, no disconnected effects, no scenery.

rows.motionBrief: MCP handoff represented by precise paw motions.
rows.prompt: Create an 8-frame horizontal sprite strip of Isle working with MCP. Preserve identity. Show precise handoff energy through alternating paw gestures, small head nods, and focused eyes. No server icons, cables, panels, command text, letters, floating marks, or shadows.

rows.motionBrief: Executing a skill with confident practiced motion.
rows.prompt: Create a 6-frame horizontal sprite strip of Isle running a skill. Keep the same blue cat. Animate a practiced confident loop: head nod, small paw sweep close to body, attentive blink, and return to ready posture. No magic effects, no badges, no text, no icons, no scenery.

rows.motionBrief: Reading an attachment through posture and gaze.
rows.prompt: Create a 6-frame horizontal sprite strip of Isle reading an attachment. Preserve identity and style. Show focused reading through downward gaze, tiny blink, paw near chin, and subtle forward lean. Do not add papers, screens, file icons, text, symbols, shadows, or background objects.

rows.motionBrief: Fast web search energy without literal browser imagery.
rows.prompt: Create an 8-frame horizontal sprite strip of Isle web searching. Keep the exact blue cat design. Animate energetic scanning with quick eye movement, alert ears, small in-place steps, and tail counter-motion. No globes, browsers, search icons, text, speed lines, dust, or detached effects.

rows.motionBrief: Testing a selected model with focused calibration posture.
rows.prompt: Create a 6-frame horizontal sprite strip of Isle testing a model. Preserve identity exactly. Show careful calibration through a steady stance, small ear twitch, focused eyes, blink, and tiny paw adjustment. No gauges, checkmarks, labels, UI, text, or floating marks.

rows.motionBrief: Provider problem reaction with a gentle failed-state loop.
rows.prompt: Create an 8-frame horizontal sprite strip of Isle reacting to a provider issue. Keep the same blue cat identity. Show worried expression, drooped ears, small slump, and slow recovery attempt. Optional effects must be tiny and attached to the body only. No red X marks, no warning triangles, no text, no detached smoke, no loose particles, no shadows.

acceptanceChecks: each atlas is 1536x1872 with 8 columns and 9 rows
each used cell is non-empty and transparent-capable
unused cells, if any, are fully transparent
row frame counts, fps values, and fallback mappings match assets/pets/isle/pet.json
all rows preserve the Isle identity and do not contain forbidden text, icons, shadows, scenery, detached effects, or guide marks
after real spritesheets are recorded, set rag/provider atlases to available true and rerun provider-intelligence, type-check, and pet preview validation
